---
title: "Team"
subtitle: "Faculty, students, research associates, and visitors of the Social Networks Group – UC"
---

::: {.snuc-org-hero .compact}
<div class="snuc-org-hero-content">
<div class="snuc-eyebrow">The Group</div>
<h1>Team</h1>
<p class="lead">Faculty, doctoral and master's students, research associates, and international visitors advancing social network science together.</p>
</div>
:::

## Core Faculty

<div class="snuc-keynote">
<div class="snuc-keynote-image"><img src="img/team/espinosa-rada.jpg" alt="Alejandro Espinosa-Rada"></div>
<div class="snuc-keynote-content">
### Alejandro Espinosa-Rada
<div class="role">Assistant Professor · Institute of Sociology, PUC</div>
<div class="bio">PhD in Sociology, University of Manchester (Mitchell Centre for Social Network Analysis); previously postdoctoral researcher and lecturer at ETH Zürich's Social Networks Lab, and currently Visiting Professor at CESO, KU Leuven. His research integrates the sociology of organizations, the sociology of science and knowledge, group dynamics, and social network analysis — focusing on how relational structures shape coordination, inequality, and institutional dynamics, and on computational methods and software for network analysis. Author and maintainer of [netmem](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/netmem/index.html); Director of [CHISOCNET](https://www.chisocnet.org); Co-Editor-in-Chief of [*Connections*](https://reference-global.com/journal/CONNECTIONS); and Scientific Communications Editor of [*Network Science*](https://www.cambridge.org/core/journals/network-science).</div>
[Faculty profile →](https://sociologia.uc.cl/academicos-as/planta-academica/alejandro-espinosa-rada/)
</div>
</div>

<div class="snuc-keynote">
<div class="snuc-keynote-image"><img src="img/team/arias.jpg" alt="Karina Arias"></div>
<div class="snuc-keynote-content">
### Karina Arias
<div class="role">Associate Professor · School of Government, PUC</div>
<div class="bio">PhD in Public Administration and Policy, Florida State University. Research: metropolitan governance, inter-municipal cooperation, and network analysis applied to public administration. Board member of the Chilean Society for Social Network Science (CHISOCNET).</div>
[Faculty profile →](https://gobierno.uc.cl/profesores/karina-arias/)
</div>
</div>

<div class="snuc-keynote">
<div class="snuc-keynote-image"><img src="img/team/luengo.jpg" alt="Daniela Luengo"></div>
<div class="snuc-keynote-content">
### Daniela Luengo
<div class="role">Assistant Professor · College UC & Faculty of Education, PUC</div>
<div class="bio">PhD in Educational Policy, University of Rochester. Research combines the economics of education, quasi-experimental methods, and network analysis to study educational-labor trajectories, equity and inclusion, and the adoption of innovations in school systems.</div>
[Faculty profile →](https://educacion.uc.cl/cuerpo-academico/planta-ordinaria/luengo-daniela/)
</div>
</div>

::: {.snuc-alliance}
**Are you a permanent academic at UC?** We welcome faculty from any unit whose work touches social networks — quantitatively, computationally, or substantively — to join the group. Email [anespinosa@uc.cl](mailto:anespinosa@uc.cl?subject=Joining%20the%20Social%20Networks%20Group%20%E2%80%93%20UC) to talk about it.
:::

## Doctoral Students

::: {.snuc-people}
<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar">RZ</div>
### Raúl Zuleta
<div class="role">PhD Student · Anthropology, PUC</div>
</div>

<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar">LH</div>
### Liliana Hurtado
<div class="role">PhD Student · Communications, PUC</div>
</div>

<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar">VR</div>
### Valquiria Ramos
<div class="role">PhD Student · Communications, PUC</div>
</div>

<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar">DT</div>
### Daniel Toro
<div class="role">PhD Student · Industrial & Systems Engineering, Universidad de Chile; Computer Science, University of Manchester</div>
</div>

<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar">DC</div>
### Diego Caro
<div class="role">PhD Student · Sociology, University of Manchester</div>
</div>

<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar">RC</div>
### Roberto Cantillán
<div class="role">PhD Student · Sociology, PUC</div>
</div>
:::

## Master's Students & Research Assistants

::: {.snuc-people}
<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar">LV</div>
### Lorenzo Vives
<div class="role">MA, Sociology, PUC</div>
</div>

<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar">AD</div>
### Alberto Durán
<div class="role">MA Student · Sociology, PUC</div>
</div>

<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar">TP</div>
### Trajan Pirkovic
<div class="role">MA Student · Sociology, PUC</div>
</div>
:::

## Research Associates

External collaborators who hold a continuing affiliation with the group.

::: {.snuc-people}
<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar">FO</div>
### [Francisca Ortiz](https://researchers.umayor.cl/es/persons/francisca-ortiz/)
<div class="role">Researcher · School of Government and Public Administration, Universidad Mayor, Chile</div>
Social support networks, caregiving systems, and social exclusion.
</div>

<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar">DP</div>
### [Diego Palacios](https://ciss.umayor.cl/investigadores/diego-palacios-phd/)
<div class="role">Associate Professor · CISS, Universidad Mayor, Chile</div>
Social network analysis of peer relationships and behavior in educational settings.
</div>

<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar">FT</div>
### [Francisco Trincado-Muñoz](https://www.brookes.ac.uk/profiles/staff/francisco-trincado-munoz)
<div class="role">Associate Professor in Business Analytics · Oxford Brookes Business School, UK</div>
Technology adoption, trust in technology, and HR analytics.
</div>

<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar">GV</div>
### [George G. Vega Yon](https://medicine.utah.edu/faculty/george-g-vega-yon)
<div class="role">Assistant Professor of Research · Division of Epidemiology, University of Utah, USA</div>
Complex systems, statistical computing, and scientific software for social network analysis.
</div>

<div class="snuc-person">
<div class="avatar">IT</div>
### [Ignacio Toledo](https://diseno.udd.cl/persona/ignacio-toledo/)
<div class="role">Researcher-Teacher · Faculty of Design, Universidad del Desarrollo, Chile</div>
Computational social science applied to design management, innovation ecosystems, and design for sustainability.
</div>
:::

## Visitors & Exchanges

::: {.snuc-table}
| Name | Home institution | Visit period |
|---|---|---|
| Pavel Krivitsky | University of New South Wales | January 2026 |
| Daniel Trujillo Martins Fontes | Universidade de São Paulo | July – August 2025 |
| Matías Montero | University of Oxford | April – October 2025 |
:::

## Internship

::: {.snuc-table}
| Name | Program | Home institution | Period |
|---|---|---|---|
| Paloma Rojas | Design | Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile | April – September 2025 |
:::
